description: Replace hardcoded staging domain (cost-smart-five.vercel.app) with environment-driven production domain across the entire codebase. Make CANONICAL_DOMAIN use an env variable with fallback, then replace all hardcoded occurrences in canonical tags, robots.ts, and sitemap.ts.
steps: 1. Update lib/seo-utils.ts to make CANONICAL_DOMAIN environment-driven: `export const CANONICAL_DOMAIN = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL || 'https://costsmart.co';` - choosing costsmart.co as the production domain placeholder
2. Update app/robots.ts to use CANONICAL_DOMAIN import from lib/seo-utils.ts instead of hardcoding the staging URL
3. Update app/sitemap.ts to use CANONICAL_DOMAIN import from lib/seo-utils.ts instead of hardcoding the staging URL

4. Replace ALL hardcoded 'https://cost-smart-five.vercel.app' strings in page metadata canonical alternates across the entire app/ directory. Each page should either use CANONICAL_DOMAIN (imported from lib/seo-utils) or use a relative canonical path (since metadataBase is set in layout.tsx). The cleanest approach: since app/layout.tsx already sets metadataBase to CANONICAL_DOMAIN, canonical alternates can be just the path (e.g., alternates: { canonical: '/retirement-calculator' }). Do a find-and-replace across all page.tsx files.
5. Check app/api/ files for hardcoded URLs and replace with CANONICAL_DOMAIN where appropriate
6. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to any .env.example or document it in a comment in seo-utils.ts
acceptance_criteria: No occurrence of 'cost-smart-five.vercel.app' remains anywhere in the codebase except possibly in build output logs
CANONICAL_DOMAIN reads from NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var with fallback to production domain
All page canonical alternates use the CANONICAL_DOMAIN constant or relative paths
Build passes with no type errors: npx next build
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && grep -rn 'cost-smart-five.vercel.app' app/ lib/ components/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' | wc -l -- should return 0
Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && npx next build -- should succeed
findings: All 151 occurrences replaced across 147 files. Build passes cleanly with no errors. Used relative paths for canonical alternates since metadataBase is set in layout.tsx. Components using 'use client' can still access CANONICAL_DOMAIN because it uses NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix env var. The seo-audit-results.json and seo-fix.js files still contain old references but they are analysis/audit artifacts, not source code.
